content.en:
After the most perfect extra-dimensional absorption secret technique was created, Ye Tian used this secret technique to fuse the Kun Realm wood fragments again.

This time, he lasted longer, and the side effects were almost non-existent.

Of course, it's not that there isn't, after all, he hasn't completely fused the Kun Realm wood fragments, and if the fusion is successful, maybe there will be side effects.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

I don't know how long it has been.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian sensed that he had already fused with the Kun Realm Wood Fragment, or that the Kun Realm Wood Fragment had merged into his Eternal Dao Species.

"The fusion was successful!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

However, he was also aware of the effect of the Kunjie Wood Fragment on him, and this extradimensional thing was actually assimilating his body at an extremely slow rate.

It's just that this assimilation speed is too slow, but after an endless long time, his body will definitely be completely assimilated beyond the dimension.

If you are extra-dimensional, then there is no problem, but this is passive extra-dimensionalization, and you can't control it, then your thinking will also be super-dimensional and become a super-dimensional slave, which is equivalent to falling.

"Sure enough, there are still side effects, but fortunately, there is a perfect extra-dimensional absorption secret technique, which can delay this situation, with the current super-dimensional assimilation speed of 870, if you want to assimilate my extra-dimensional, it will take too long, don't worry about it at present, it's a big deal that this body will be changed when the time comes. "

Ye Tian muttered.

After fusing the Kun Realm Wood Fragments, Ye Tian began to study how to use the Kun Realm Wood Fragments to control the extradimensional power, but there were definitely not many extradimensional powers that he could control.

So in the years that followed, he began this kind of research, trying again and again.

Soon after, he was able to use the power of the extradimensional in a superficial way, but he had to use the Kunjie Wood Fragment, otherwise he would still not be able to use the power of the extradimensional.

If you can activate the power of the extra-dimensional without the help of extra-dimensional things, it must be that you have completely controlled the power of the extra-dimensional.

I saw that Ye Tian manipulated the power of the extradimensional to turn into a ray of light and blasted towards an area.

Bang!!!

That area was directly shattered.

Then, he used a replica body as an experimental subject, and manipulated extradimensional power to attack.

As a result, the replica body was defended by Eternal Realm Spirituality, and it was still pierced.

Burst!!!!

The copy body is penetrated, and the physical body can't stop collapsing.

Obviously, the attack of the extradimensional power is too terrifying, and after the body is penetrated, it is almost impossible to heal and recover from the injury, so it can't stop collapsing!

Eventually, the replica body fell and died.

"The power of the super-dimensional is terrifying, after I fused the extra-dimensional thing Kun Realm Wood Fragment, the attack power has definitely reached the peak realm god level!!!

Ye Tian was surprised.

In fact, the normal extradimensional power is not so powerful, because this is a fragment of the medium extradimensional thing Kunjie Wood, even if it is a small fragment, its essence is still a medium extradimensional thing, but the extradimensional power mobilized is relatively small.

But no matter how little it is, it's still more powerful than those low-level extradimensional things!

Among those supreme forces, all the peak realm gods who have successfully fused extra-dimensional things are low-level extra-dimensional things, and naturally they are not as good as the Kun Realm wood fragments fused by Ye Tian!

Therefore, Ye Tiancai felt that the extradimensional thing was so powerful!

......

Ye Tian continued to study the power of the extra-dimensional, and the more he studied, the more he felt the horror of the super-dimensional power.

"Anything related to extradimensional power is extremely powerful, no wonder those supreme forces are so keen on extradimensional things!"

At the same time, Ye Tian was also extremely eager for the extradimensional realm.

Now, what he wants most is to create an extradimensional art.

Although he was able to control the power of the extra-dimensional, he relied on the wood fragments of the Kun Realm, not by himself, and if he wanted to truly exert the super-dimensional power, he had to create the extra-dimensional technique.

It's like just now, he controlled the extradimensional power attack, and he was actually able to dodge it, he just deliberately used the copy body to resist.

If you don't resist hard, you can still avoid it with the use of speed-based Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques, which is why the use of extradimensional power is too superficial.

And so.

Ye Tian continued to deduce and create, hoping to create a relatively powerful extradimensional technique.

But soon, Ye Tian found that if he wanted to exert the power of the extradimensional power, the extradimensional technique created must be related to the Kun Realm Wood Fragment, after all, his extradimensional power was still with the help of the Kun Realm Wood Fragment, not the extradimensional power he mastered.

So.

With the assistance of the Tianyan Roulette, Ye Tian's hope of creating a transcendent technique was naturally great.

Time flies, and hundreds of millions of Dao epochs have passed.

After trying again and again, Ye Tian finally created a seemingly good extradimensional technique.

He was going to find someone to test this extradimensional art.

...... []

Terran, the Endless Kingdoms Alliance.

Li Yang came to the Terran Temple, he was very nervous in his heart, he didn't know why Ye Tian Ancestor summoned him.

He was just an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm God Realm of the Terran race, in other words, before the rise of the Terran race, his cultivation was not bad, but it was not worth mentioning now.

Moreover, his status was far inferior to the ordinary half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, because his Eternal Dao Seed was seriously damaged, and there was hope for healing and recovery, but the price paid was too great, and it would take too long to repair it little by little.

Once, a middle-level realm god of the human race told him that the price paid to help him restore the Eternal Dao seed was even greater than cultivating a middle-level realm god.

When he knew, he knew he had no hope of recovery.

After all, even if he recovered, he didn't know if he had any hope of breaking through to the middle level of the realm god, how could the human race pay such a huge price to restore him!

Besides, similar to him, there are a lot of people who have been damaged by the Eternal Dao Race, and if they all let the Terran recover, then the resources of the entire Terran Race will not be enough!

After arriving at the Terran Temple, he found that many familiar people had arrived.

These people are all like him, the Eternal Dao Seed is damaged, and some of the Eternal Dao Seed damage is even more dangerous, and they are even in the risk of being about to turn into a demon seed all the time.

At this time, he was very strange as to why Ye Tian Ancestor had allowed these Eternal Dao Seed Damaged People to come here.

Could it be that the Terrans want to help them restore the Eternal Dao Seed?

"Impossible, the cost of doing so is too great, and the Terrans can't afford to repair it!"

Li Yang shook his head secretly.

Suddenly.

A Terran Realm God brought Li Yang to the place where Ye Tian Ancestor lived.

Here, he met Ye Tian Ancestor.
